query: DELETE FROM geofence_alerts WHERE targetId IN (SELECT id FROM tdoa_targets WHERE label LIKE '%Test%' OR label LIKE 'E-%' OR label LIKE '%Batch%' OR label LIKE 'Shared%' OR label LIKE 'Updated%');
